mapper.insert: INSERT INTO export_outbound_scan ( qr_type, export_order_id, detail_id, unit_type, unit_no, qty, scan_status, stock_applied ) VALUES ( #{qrType}, #{exportOrderId}, #{detailId}, #{unitType}, #{unitNo}, #{qty}, 'WAITING', 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM export_outbound_scan WHERE export_order_id = #{exportOrderId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN qr_type = 'EXPORT' THEN 1 WHEN qr_type = 'UNPLANNED_EXPORT' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, detail_id, id
SELECT * FROM export_outbound_scan WHERE detail_id = #{detailId} ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE export_outbound_scan SET scan_status = 'DONE', scanned_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE export_outbound_scan SET scan_status = 'WAITING', scanned_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND scan_status = 'DONE'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_outbound_scan WHERE export_order_id = #{exportOrderId} AND scan_status = 'WAITING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_outbound_scan WHERE export_order_id = #{exportOrderId} AND scan_status = 'DONE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_outbound_scan WHERE detail_id = #{detailId} AND scan_status = 'WAITING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_outbound_scan WHERE detail_id = #{detailId} AND scan_status = 'DONE'
SELECT * FROM export_outbound_scan WHERE export_order_id = #{exportOrderId} AND scan_status = 'DONE' AND stock_applied = 'N' ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE export_outbound_scan SET stock_applied = 'Y', stock_applied_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(qty), 0) FROM export_outbound_scan WHERE detail_id = #{detailId} AND scan_status = 'DONE' AND stock_applied = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE export_outbound_scan SET stock_applied = 'Y', stock_applied_at = NOW() WHERE detail_id = #{detailId} AND scan_status = 'DONE' AND stock_applied = 'N'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM export_outbound_scan WHERE export_order_id = #{exportOrderId} AND scan_status = 'WAITING' AND qr_type = 'EXPORT'
DELETE FROM export_outbound_scan WHERE export_order_id = #{exportOrderId} AND scan_status = 'WAITING' AND qr_type = 'UNPLANNED_EXPORT'
